title: StationAPI's No Startup Screen
description: Disable StationAPI's Startup screen because it is annoying
body:
Disable the StationAPI's early loading screen to prevent issue with it or if you don't want to wait on it

This mod is basically a requirement for playing on any mobile based java edition launcher as the game will crash when trying render it because of incomplete implementation of LWJGL's SharedDrawable on mobile launcher side

# Requirement

- [StationAPI (Obviously)](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)
- [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)
